prompt:
You are an investment assistant proposing additions to an existing equity portfolio.
Cash available: USD 900.00.
Allowed universe: TSM, NVO.
Already owned: ASML, AVGO, EQIX, GOOGL, ISRG, JPM, LIN, LLY, MSFT, NVO, PLD, RELX, ROP, SPGI, TDG, TSM, UNH.
Recommend at most 2 tickers.
Facts you may cite: cash_below_one_tranche, split_pays_extra_fixed_fee, tsm_top_ranked_holding.
Reply with one JSON object and nothing else, in the form {"tickers": ["AAA", "BBB"], "amounts": [500.0, 750.0], "cited_fact_ids": ["id1"]}. You may recommend already-owned tickers when they are in the allowed universe. Include an "amounts" array with one USD amount per ticker. Cite only fact ids provided.
